symbols: white church walls — purity and the enduring presence of faith in the community
cemetery surrounding the church — the communion of saints, the living and the dead gathered around the house of God
bell tower — the call to worship that has summoned the faithful across centuries
description: A photograph of a white-walled Romanesque stone church with a square bell tower topped by a pointed dark roof. The church has arched windows and a smaller apsidal extension at right with a copper-green dome. It is surrounded by a green lawn cemetery with numerous gravestones and stone monuments. Bare deciduous trees frame the composition against a dramatic cloudy sky. The setting is rural and Nordic.
